_comment: SYNTHETIC recorded volatility3 report for offline demo of the SANDWORM memory lane. Shaped as the operator-captured JSON our normalizer ingests: [{plugin, rows}, ...]. malfind rows carry an injected RWX region in the process the loader hollowed, corroborating T1055 from memory. The leading target_sha256 element binds this report to samples/synthetic/loader_demo.exe — the binary it was captured from; SANDWORM refuses to fold it into any other sample.

rows.Notes: MZ header in private RWX region (no backing file)

_comment: psscan (pool-tag scan) sees PID 666 that pslist does not → unlinked EPROCESS = hidden process (DKOM rootkit), surfaced as observed T1014.
Config carved from heap: the actual C2, the recovered RSA key, and the encrypted-file tally — static says 'can encrypt', memory says 'did encrypt 417 files'.
